subcodes.first_line: O Divine Herald! 'Abdu'l-Bahá is well-pleased with thee, and from the Supreme Kingdom, at every moment, a fresh bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی الهی عبدالبهاء راضی از شما و از ملکوت اعلی هر دم شما را فیض جدیدی و
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
